features.name: fsm_always_ff_with_state_regs
features.description: Code should include a finite state machine implemented in an always_ff procedural block with state register variables

features.name: procedural_control_flow_in_always_ff
features.description: Code should include procedural if-else or case statements inside an always_ff block that cause cf.cond_br in output

features.name: multi_var_state_update_block
features.description: Code should include multiple sequential variables updated within a single procedural block, causing llhd.combinational output

features.name: complex_fsm_with_fanout
features.description: Code should include an FSM with many state variables and conditional branches that triggers cf.cond_br with high fanout
